arts.ttl: Arsenal face double Cunha threat after CLUB-RECORD offer
arts.sum: Aston Villa and Nottingham Forest are ready to rival Arsenal for the signature of Matheus Cunha, according to a report. Sky Sports reported on Thursday that Nottingham Forest had begun taking a keen interest in the situation of Cunha and that they were ready to make a club-record offer for the striker.
